zh-CN: 面向微服务与集群的「多维表」云配置能力：集中管理、轻量依赖，让集群内每个服务都能以注解方式获得一致的数据可视化管理体验。
en-US: Cloud-native multidimensional table configuration for clusters: centralized management, light dependencies, and consistent annotation-driven admin across services.

zh-CN: 与开源 Erupt 注解体系一脉相承，把「对象视图模型」延伸到分布式场景：配置上行、能力下行，开发与运维协作更顺滑。
en-US: Built on the same annotation model as open-source Erupt, extending OVM to distributed setups—smoother dev and ops handoff.

zh-CN: 在云端统一维护多维表、节点与策略，各服务实例按需同步，降低分散配置带来的不一致风险。
en-US: Centralize multidimensional schemas and policies; instances sync on demand, reducing configuration drift.

zh-CN: 以最小侵入方式接入现有 Spring Boot / 微服务体系，版本与主工程对齐，便于持续升级。
en-US: Minimal intrusion into Spring Boot and microservices; align versions with the main Erupt stack for easier upgrades.

zh-CN: 通过 Node 配置将集群内服务纳入同一视图，配合控制台理解调用与数据面关系。

zh-CN: 让集群中的业务服务也能挂载 Erupt 管理界面，无需为每个子系统重复搭建后台脚手架。
en-US: Expose Erupt admin UIs on business services without rebuilding admin scaffolding per subsystem.

en-US: 🌊 Erupt Flow Universal Workflow Engine

zh-CN: Erupt AI 大模型深度集成
将大模型能力无缝融入低代码开发，让 AI 赋能每一个业务场景
en-US: Seamlessly integrate LLM capabilities into low-code development, empowering every business scenario with AI

zh-CN: 开箱即用的多模型 · 多工具 · 全场景 AI 能力
en-US: Multi-model · Multi-tool · Full-scenario AI capabilities, ready out of the box

zh-CN: 兼容所有主流大模型，OpenAI / Claude / Gemini / DeepSeek / 通义千问等，统一接口一键切换
en-US: Compatible with all mainstream LLMs — OpenAI / Claude / Gemini / DeepSeek / Qwen — unified API, one-click switching

zh-CN: 完整的多轮对话上下文管理，AI 始终理解对话历史，渐进式构建复杂业务逻辑
en-US: Complete multi-turn dialogue context management, AI always understands conversation history for progressive complex logic building

zh-CN: 基于 ReAct 模式的自主推理 Agent，可拆解复杂任务、制定计划、调用工具并迭代优化直至完成
en-US: Autonomous reasoning Agent based on ReAct pattern, decomposes complex tasks, plans, invokes tools and iterates until completion

zh-CN: 同时支持 MCP Server 与 Client，标准化工具注册与发现，安全连接外部 AI 生态
en-US: Supports both MCP Server and Client, standardized tool registration and discovery, securely connects to external AI ecosystems

zh-CN: 内置流式响应的对话界面，支持 Markdown 渲染、代码高亮，打造沉浸式 AI 交互体验
en-US: Built-in streaming chat interface with Markdown rendering and code highlighting for immersive AI interaction experience

zh-CN: 灵活配置系统提示词，定义 AI 角色、行为边界与输出格式，精准控制每一次对话
en-US: Flexibly configure system prompts to define AI roles, behavior boundaries, and output formats for precise control of every conversation

zh-CN: 基于 Apache 2.0 协议完全开源，社区驱动持续迭代，源码透明无商业限制
en-US: Fully open source under Apache 2.0 license, community-driven continuous iteration, transparent source code with no commercial restrictions

zh-CN: 通过注解声明即可将 Java 方法注册为 AI 工具，支持运行时动态注册，按需扩展 AI 能力
en-US: Register Java methods as AI tools via annotation declarations, support runtime dynamic registration, extend AI capabilities on demand

zh-CN: Erupt AI 采用分层架构设计，将大模型能力与低代码框架深度融合
en-US: Erupt AI uses layered architecture design, deeply integrating LLM capabilities with the low-code framework

zh-CN: Model Context Protocol — 让 AI 拥有标准化的外部工具调用能力
en-US: Model Context Protocol — Giving AI standardized external tool invocation capabilities

zh-CN: MCP（Model Context Protocol）是一种标准化协议，允许大模型通过统一接口调用外部工具与服务。Erupt 深度集成 MCP 协议，让 AI 能安全、高效地访问数据库、API、文件系统等各类资源
en-US: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a standardized protocol that allows LLMs to invoke external tools and services through a unified interface. Erupt deeply integrates MCP protocol, enabling AI to securely and efficiently access databases, APIs, file systems and other resources

zh-CN: Erupt 作为 MCP Server 对外暴露数据管理能力，任何兼容 MCP 协议的 AI 客户端均可接入
en-US: Erupt acts as an MCP Server exposing data management capabilities. Any MCP-compatible AI client can connect

zh-CN: Erupt 同时作为 MCP Client，可调用外部 MCP 服务扩展 AI 能力边界，如搜索引擎、知识库、第三方 API 等
en-US: Erupt also acts as an MCP Client, invoking external MCP services to extend AI capability boundaries such as search engines, knowledge bases, and third-party APIs

zh-CN: 通过注解声明即可将 Java 方法注册为 MCP 工具，AI 可自动发现并调用
en-US: Register Java methods as MCP tools through annotation declarations. AI can auto-discover and invoke them

zh-CN: 所有工具调用均在安全沙箱中执行，支持权限控制与调用审计
en-US: All tool invocations execute in a secure sandbox with permission control and audit logging

zh-CN: 支持运行时动态注册与注销工具，根据业务场景灵活调整 AI 可用能力
en-US: Support runtime dynamic registration and deregistration of tools, flexibly adjusting AI capabilities based on business scenarios

zh-CN: Reasoning + Acting — AI 自主推理、规划与执行
en-US: Reasoning + Acting — AI autonomous reasoning, planning and execution

zh-CN: Erupt AI 采用 ReAct（Reasoning and Acting）模式，让大模型不仅能思考，还能自主调用工具执行操作。AI 会分析用户意图，制定执行计划，逐步调用工具完成复杂任务
en-US: Erupt AI adopts the ReAct (Reasoning and Acting) pattern, enabling LLMs to not only think but also autonomously invoke tools. AI analyzes user intent, formulates execution plans, and progressively calls tools to complete complex tasks

zh-CN: AI 分析用户输入，理解意图，拆解任务目标
en-US: AI analyzes user input, understands intent, and decomposes task goals

zh-CN: 选择合适的工具与执行顺序，制定执行计划
en-US: Selects appropriate tools and execution order, formulates execution plan

zh-CN: 调用工具获取结果，观察反馈
en-US: Invokes tools to get results, observes feedback

zh-CN: 根据结果继续推理，循环直至任务完成
en-US: Continues reasoning based on results, loops until task completion

zh-CN: 用户：帮我查看上个月销售额超过10万的客户，并生成一份分析报告
en-US: User: Show me customers with sales over 100k last month and generate an analysis report

zh-CN: 思考：需要先查询数据库获取上月销售数据，筛选出超过10万的记录
en-US: Thought: Need to query the database for last month's sales data, filter records over 100k

zh-CN: 执行：调用数据查询工具 → SQL: SELECT * FROM sales WHERE amount > 100000 AND month = last_month
en-US: Action: Call data query tool → SQL: SELECT * FROM sales WHERE amount > 100000 AND month = last_month

zh-CN: 观察：获得 23 条符合条件的客户记录
思考：需要对数据进行统计分析，生成报告
en-US: Thought: Need to perform statistical analysis on data and generate report

zh-CN: 执行：调用数据分析工具 → 生成销售趋势、客户分布等图表
en-US: Action: Call data analysis tool → Generate sales trends, customer distribution charts

zh-CN: 结果：生成完整的分析报告，包含数据汇总、趋势图表和建议
en-US: Result: Generated complete analysis report with data summary, trend charts and recommendations

zh-CN: 通过自然语言直接驱动服务器，操作注解驱动的数据与业务——像与同事对话一样简单
en-US: Drive your server with natural language — query, write and operate annotation-driven data as if chatting with a colleague

zh-CN: 输入自然语言，AI Claw 自动解析意图、调用技能、返回结果
en-US: Type natural language — AI Claw parses intent, invokes skills, and returns results

zh-CN: 像与同事对话一样简单——AI Claw 让自然语言成为服务器的控制台
en-US: As simple as chatting with a colleague — AI Claw turns natural language into a server console

zh-CN: 用一句话完成复杂的服务器操作，无需记忆命令语法，AI 自动理解意图并执行
en-US: Complete complex server operations with a sentence. No memorizing syntax — AI understands intent and acts

zh-CN: 直接操作 Erupt 注解驱动的业务数据，增删改查一步到位，数据与业务逻辑无缝贯通
en-US: Directly manipulate Erupt annotation-driven business data. Create, read, update and delete — all in one natural command

zh-CN: 支持执行系统级 Shell 命令，实现服务器运维自动化，让 AI 成为你的运维助手
en-US: Execute system-level shell commands for server operations automation — AI becomes your ops assistant

zh-CN: 读取与写入服务器文件，支持日志分析、配置修改等常见运维场景，开箱即用
en-US: Read and write server files. Analyze logs, modify configs and more, all through natural language

zh-CN: 通过 Skills 扩展机制注册自定义能力，无限扩展 AI Claw 的操作边界
en-US: Register custom capabilities via the Skills extension — expand AI Claw's boundaries without limits

zh-CN: 通过注解声明自定义技能，将任意 Java 方法注册为 AI 可调用的操作
en-US: Declare custom skills via annotations — register any Java method as an AI-callable operation

zh-CN: 一个注解，注册自定义技能
通过 @Skill 注解将任意 Java 方法注册为 AI Claw 的可调用技能。AI 能自动发现技能、理解参数含义，并在对话中按需调用。
en-US: Use the @Skill annotation to register any Java method as a callable skill. AI auto-discovers skills, understands parameters, and invokes them on demand.

zh-CN: 自动发现与描述生成|参数类型自动推断|运行时动态注册|权限与安全控制
en-US: Auto discovery & description|Auto parameter type inference|Dynamic registration at runtime|Permission & security control

zh-CN: 几行配置，让自然语言接管你的服务器
en-US: A few lines of config to let natural language take over your server

zh-CN: 拖拽即分析，注解即模型。
en-US: Inspired by Google Looker's semantic layer, Erupt Cube brings professional-grade big data analytics to the Java ecosystem — define models with annotations, analyze with drag-and-drop.

zh-CN: 语义模型解决了什么问题
没有语义层，每个人写自己的 SQL，口径不一致、逻辑到处复制、改一张表要改十个报表。语义模型把指标定义一次，全局复用。
en-US: Without a semantic layer, every analyst writes their own SQL — inconsistent metrics, duplicated logic, fragile reports. A semantic model defines metrics once and shares them everywhere.

zh-CN: 数据工程师专注构建可复用的语义模型，数据分析师基于模型自助分析——两个角色分工明确，无需相互等待。
en-US: Data engineers build reusable semantic models; analysts self-serve on top. Clear separation of concerns, no waiting for each other.

zh-CN: 用 @EruptCube 定义数据源与 SQL|用 @Dimension 声明可分组、可筛选的维度|用 @Measure 封装聚合指标逻辑|业务指标沉淀为标准化可复用资产|修改表结构只需改模型层，一处改处处生效
en-US: Define data source and SQL with @EruptCube|Declare groupable/filterable dimensions with @Dimension|Encapsulate aggregation logic with @Measure|Standardize business metrics as reusable assets|Schema changes only require updating the model layer

zh-CN: 基于语义层自助完成可视化分析|无需关心底层 SQL 实现细节|拖拽维度和指标即可生成图表|所有指标口径统一，不再争论数字|专注业务洞察，而非技术实现
en-US: Self-serve visualization on top of the semantic layer|No need to understand underlying SQL|Drag dimensions and measures to build charts|Consistent metrics — no more arguing about numbers|Focus on business insights, not technical details

zh-CN: 四个注解，构建完整分析体系
没有新语言，没有新 DSL，Java 开发者开箱即用。
en-US: No new language, no new DSL. Works out of the box for any Java developer.

zh-CN: 绑定 SQL 数据源（支持子查询或直接引用表），声明对外暴露的查询视图。
en-US: Bind a SQL data source (subquery or table reference) and declare exposed query views.

zh-CN: 声明可用于分组和筛选的字段，支持日期、字符串、数值类型自动推断。
en-US: Declare fields for grouping and filtering. Type inference handles date, string, and number automatically.

zh-CN: 将 count、sum、avg、复合表达式等聚合逻辑封装为可复用指标，一处定义全局生效。
en-US: Encapsulate count, sum, avg, and compound expressions as reusable measures — define once, use everywhere.

zh-CN: 声明运行时动态传入的查询条件，支持枚举选项，让语义模型更灵活。
en-US: Declare runtime filter parameters with optional enum choices for flexible, parameterized queries.

zh-CN: 多表 JOIN 查询、多个维度与指标，全部通过注解声明，无需编写任何 Controller 或 Service。
en-US: Multi-table JOIN, dimensions and measures — all declared with annotations. Zero Controller or Service code required.

zh-CN: 从建模到洞察，全程无摩擦
en-US: From Model to Insight, Zero Friction

zh-CN: 过去需要多方协同数周才能完成的 BI 链路，现在一个工程师一天内搞定。
en-US: What used to require weeks of cross-team coordination now takes a single engineer a day.

zh-CN: 🗃️:分析 SQL 数据源|⬡:@EruptCube 声明模型|📐:@Dimension 定义维度|📊:@Measure 封装指标|🖱️:拖拽生成图表|💡:业务洞察
en-US: 🗃️:Analyze SQL source|⬡:@EruptCube model|📐:@Dimension fields|📊:@Measure metrics|🖱️:Drag & drop charts|💡:Business insights

zh-CN: Google Looker、Cube.dev 与 Erupt Cube 都实现了语义层理念，但工程能力天差地别。注解方案在 IDE 支持、版本管理、动态性和继承上全面领先。
